title: Delta
description: Delta: Contains the Diff plus context information: parent Stream, Timestamp, etc.

StreamID.description: The ID of the owning Stream. It must be the same for both the Revision that this Delta targets and the Revision that it will produce.

RevisionFrom.description: Revision ID that this Delta targets.

RevisionTo.description: Revision ID that this Delta produces.

Author.description: Any descriptive string identifying either the Author and/or the software used.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
